subScenes.name: 找商品位置
subScenes.description: 询问牛奶和燕麦片在哪个区域

qaPairs.speakerText: Excuse me, where can I find the dairy section?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 不好意思，请问乳制品区在哪里？

responses.text: It's down the aisle to the left, next to the eggs.
responses.text_cn: 在左边过道，挨着鸡蛋那边。

responses.text: Just go straight and turn left at the produce section.
Over there, near the cheese.

qaPairs.usageNote: 用于询问商品具体位置

qaPairs.speakerText: Do you have almond milk in the refrigerated section?

responses.text: Yes, it's on the bottom shelf, next to the soy milk.
Sorry, we're out of stock right now.
Try the organic aisle, aisle 5.

qaPairs.usageNote: 确认特定商品是否在售

subScenes.name: 确认计量单位
subScenes.description: 确认商品是按公斤还是按袋卖

qaPairs.speakerText: Is this yogurt sold by the pound or by the container?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 这个酸奶是按磅卖还是按盒卖？

responses.text: It's sold by the container — each one is 16 ounces.
You can buy them in packs of four.
Just grab one — they're all the same size.

qaPairs.speakerText: How much does this bag of apples weigh?

responses.text: It's exactly 2 pounds — the scale shows it.
You can pick your own — they're sold by weight.
responses.text_cn: 你可以自己挑，按重量计价。

responses.text: Pre-packaged — 1.5 lbs each.

subScenes.name: 询问促销活动
subScenes.description: 确认商品是否有折扣或赠品

qaPairs.speakerText: Is there a special deal on bread today?

responses.text: Yes! Buy one, get one half off — it's on the end cap.
responses.text_cn: 有！买一送半价，在端架上。

responses.text: No deals right now, but it's usually cheaper on Wednesdays.
responses.text_cn: 现在没有，周三通常便宜。

responses.text: Try the loyalty app — you get 10% off if you scan it.

qaPairs.speakerText: Do you have any coupons for cereal?

responses.text: They're at the front near the checkout — grab one!
responses.text_cn: 收银台附近有，自己拿一份！

responses.text: Not today, but we're running a buy-3-get-1-free.
responses.text_cn: 今天没有，但有买三送一。

responses.text: You can download them from our website.

subScenes.name: 找收银台
subScenes.description: 询问最近的收银台在哪里

responses.text: Right at the front, just past the magazines.
There's one on the left near the pharmacy.
Try the self-checkout by the doors.

qaPairs.speakerText: Which line is moving fastest right now?

responses.text: The self-checkout — only two people ahead.
responses.text_cn: 自助结账，前面只有两人。

responses.text: Avoid the one with the elderly lady — she's paying with cash.
responses.text_cn: 别排那位老人的队，他付现金。

responses.text: The express lane — under 10 items.

qaPairs.usageNote: 选择最有效率的结账队伍
